name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: v0.6.1 + defensive trail-line sweep on every closed-trade render. Trail lines (the active-trade BE-locked stop horizontal_line) sometimes persisted on the chart after the trade closed because the position_remove handler for trade:active was missed (broadcaster diff-dedup or WS reconnect race). The user is explicit that trail lines are active-only — closed widgets now always sweep trade:active:trail (and pos:current:trail) on render, so a closed widget can never coexist with a stale trail. Plus v0.6.1's frozen original-stop bands and v0.6.0's swing-folder routing.
